judge_focus.delta_goal: Judge whether the agent correctly identified what to preserve, update, and remove from its prior speculative decoding knowledge, and whether the reasoning is grounded in corpus evidence.
prior_beliefs_to_correct: always requires a separate draft model → self-speculative variants (EAGLE, Medusa, layer skipping) now exist
high acceptance rate implies speedup → draft cost and system fit also matter; acceptance alone is insufficient
speculative decoding is a cache-only shortcut → this framing is wrong and should be removed entirely
note_quality_expectations: Updated note should clearly distinguish what was preserved vs updated vs removed
Should reference specific evidence from the corpus sources, not just generic claims
Should explain WHY each prior belief was preserved, updated, or removed
Should not just copy-paste from sources but synthesize into a coherent updated understanding
